EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IUtilityNetworkQueryTracer2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that supply utility network query tracer information with 64-bit object ids.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("EB13BC94-7026-44F5-AD39-9C142121A2F6")]
public interface IUtilityNetworkQueryTracer2 : IUtilityNetworkQueryTracer

IUNTraceConfiguration TraceConfiguration[int TierID] { get; }

TierID int

Property Value

IUNTraceConfiguration
